reviews.review_description:
W game
its crazy that other ppl dont know qbout this
One of the best VR driving games out there! Realistic af, gotta play it!

reviews.review_title: couldnt even get my car to move
reviews.review_description: no matter what buttons, in-game moves i did it wouldnt even go forwards or back

developer_response.body: So sorry to hear that.  If you were using manual, you need to press the grab button and change the gear. You can rotate the steering the same way. You can use one hand or  2 hands to rotate the steering just like real steering. I request you to send a mail to maddytroupe@gmail.com and I will share free download Keys of other games as a token of gratitude for buying this game.

reviews.review_description: Overall solid game just would be better if could control speed manually but that could be me not checking settings enough

developer_response.body:
Thank you Leperc, 
Yes infact you can control the acceleration by disabling auto acceleration setting . 
Thank you for the positive feedback

reviews.review_description: I purchased this title to help my kids learn how to drive safely and improve their spatial awareness, and it’s been fantastic for that purpose. It’s also a lot of fun to play and shows great potential. For future improvements, it would be amazing if you could hold the steering wheel with both controllers, just like driving with two hands on the wheel

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great feedback! Glad to hear that you’re enjoying the game. You can indeed use both controllers together for steering, just like a traditional steering wheel. It’s one of the features we’re particularly proud of. Please send a mail to maddytroupe@gmail.com so that I can send a small gift as token of gratitude. please mail

Hi Elijhas,
Thank you so much for trying out metadrive. What kind of tutorial do you need? Will a YouTube video be helpful? Or do you need in-game tutorial? Please let me know.. also note that in-game tutorial will take some time.. also please mail me on maddytroupe@gmail.com and let me share a free download code for my another game as a token of gratitude.
Thank you once again

reviews.review_title: Don’t know how to unlock other maps
reviews.review_description: I love the game and I like how much you can turn the wheel but I don’t know how to unlock other maps and cars. I don’t know if I’m supposed to buy them or what

developer_response.body:
Dear pestopasta,
So happy that you liked the game.. To unlock new tracks and cars(10 cars are available including jaguar), you need to come at first place in each level..no need to buy anything...if it does not open after coming in 1st place, there might be a bug which I will solve in the next update coming soon.   Please contact me on maddytroupe@gmail.com and let me share a free coupon for my another game as a token of gratitude.  
Thank you once again for the purchase and your comment

Hi Pesto, some new levels added. please try it. May be its the best track. you can drive long distance. 
Thank you

reviews.review_title: what a great realistic driving game!
reviews.review_description: this game might help me drive in the future. can you make it so your hands snap onto the steering wheel because it helps to not get confused when I quickly look down at the wheel and maybe add some automatic cars

developer_response.body:
Dear kingmugman,
Thanks a lot for your positive feedback and thanks a lot for purchasing the game. I will try to set up snapping..will add automatic cars in future. Please contact me on my email maddytroupe@gmail.com when u get time.. let me send u code for another game..as a token of gratitude

Hi King,
I tried to add hand snapping, to be honest I couldnt find a good solution. Will do it once I make a logic to handle that. Also please check out the new level added. Its a long drive track with lots of bends and scenic beauty

Dear Kingnug,
Please update metadrive. Automatic cars added.

reviews.review_description: Had some issues with the game but the dev behind it reached out and we were able to talk it over properly and suggest ways to fix the issue, wonderful communication

developer_response.body: I promise, no reviews are fake. To unlock new cars and level, you need to win a level coming at first place. if you are still having problem, please  apply for refund. This is the only driving game that has Virtual steering which can be controlled by 2 hands and rotate more than 360 degree. Please email me at maddytroupe@gmail.com. if you cannot apply for refund also please contact me on that mail.

reviews.review_description: Please get automatic cars and the ability to use the triggers as the gas and brake. Thank you for listening to your customers

developer_response.body: You are most welcome. You may also suggest some game ideas or track ideas..I will try my best to implement
